recommendations.title: Pretty Persuasion
recommendations.overview: A 15-year-old girl incites chaos among her friends and a media frenzy when she accuses her drama teacher of sexual harassment.

recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control and must find a way out before it’s too late.
recommendations.director: Thanabodee Uawithya, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Sita Likitvanichkul, Adirek Watleela

recommendations.title: Steve
recommendations.overview: Over one intense day, the devoted head teacher of a last-chance reform school strives to keep his students in line while facing pressures of his own.

recommendations.title: Lost and Delirious
recommendations.overview: After starting at an upmarket boarding school, a teenage girl forms close friendships with her two older roommates. However, when she discovers that her new friends are lovers she finds herself caught in a complicated situation.

recommendations.title: Run Hide Fight
recommendations.overview: A 17-year-old girl uses her wits, survival skills, and compassion to fight for her life, and those of her fellow classmates, against a group of live-streaming school shooters.

recommendations.title: You Can Count on Me
recommendations.overview: A single mother's life is thrown into turmoil after her struggling, rarely-seen younger brother returns to town.

recommendations.title: Fist Fight
recommendations.overview: When one school teacher gets the other fired, he is challenged to an after-school fight.

recommendations.title: Skirt Day
recommendations.overview: A teacher, driven to exasperation from insults and insubordination, takes her class hostage.

recommendations.title: The Fugitive
recommendations.overview: Wrongfully convicted of murdering his wife and sentenced to death, Richard Kimble escapes from the law in an attempt to find the real killer and clear his name.

recommendations.title: Better Days
recommendations.overview: A bullied teenage girl forms an unlikely friendship with a mysterious young man who protects her from her assailants, while she copes with the pressures of her final examinations.
